ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. The disability status field was truncated in the provided HTML but inferred from standard Lever patterns.

fields.question: How did you hear about us?
If you were referred to Magnet, who referred you? (Note: We may verify referral details internally.)
Please enter the country you are legally registered to work in.
Will you require sponsorship or other assistance or support to be authorized to, or otherwise, work from your country of residence?
Work authorization
options: I am authorized to work in the country due to my nationality
I am authorized to work in the country based on a valid work permit and do not need a company to sponsor my visa
I am authorized to work in the country based on a valid work permit which needs to be sponsored by the company I work for
I am not authorized to work in the country and need visa support

fields.question: What is your notice period to begin working with Magnet Forensics?
What are your total annual salary expectations (OTE)?

Are you a Citizen of The United States?
Do you have Vulnerability Research experience?
Do you have experience in low level iOS AND/OR low level Android?
Do you have experience with Embedded Linux?
Do you have experience with Bluetooth AND/OR Wifi?
Race
options: Black or African American (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander (Not Hispanic or Latino)
American Indian or Alaska Native (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Two or More Races (Not Hispanic or Latino)

fields.question: Veteran status
options: I am not a Protected Veteran

fields.question: Disability status
options: Yes, I have a disability, or have had one in the past
No, I do not have a disability and have not had one in the past
I do not want to answer
